project_type: Python FastAPI + Jinja2 Dashboard (multi-agent investment analysis)
verification_instructions: Run pytest, confirm 448+ tests pass, check server starts with python -m dashboard.app
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Python 3.11 available.
contribution_requirements: Commit in Chinese. Work on main branch directly. Do not modify test files to make tests pass.
key_patterns: FastAPI app in dashboard/app.py with Jinja2 templates. Bloomberg dark theme CSS. Data from yfinance via provider chain in src/augur/data.py and src/augur/datasources/. Scanner module is a shim that re-exports from src/augur/. Config via src/augur/config.py. Bots in src/augur/bots/. Rate limiting already exists (per-ticker). Version in pyproject.toml and dashboard/app.py.
directory_structure: src/augur/ = core package (personas, data, config, bots, registry). dashboard/ = FastAPI web app (app.py, templates/, static/). scanner/ = compat shim. tests/ = pytest tests. docs/ = documentation. personas/ = YAML persona definitions.
